_note: Channel manifest for recursive.eco. Makes this repo self-describing: recursive.eco imports it as a channel by reading this file from raw.githubusercontent.com/PlayfulProcess/nara/main/recursive-eco.json. Declares the channel identity (rendered as a channel-document, document_data.is_channel=true), where its grammars live (grammars/<slug>/grammar.json), and the slug->UUID map (ids.json). Membership lives in `tools` (channel_slug). Mirrors recursive-tarot/recursive-eco.json. See recursive-eco/docs/DESIGN-import-channel-from-github.md.

channel.name: Nara — The Human-Subjective Sky
channel.description: The tropical zodiac read honestly — a human frame laid over the year, anchored to the equinoxes and solstices, not the stars. Educational and reflective, never predictive.

hero.title: Nara — The Human-Subjective Sky
hero.subtitle: The tropical wheel of the year as an honest human frame — the astronomy is real, the meanings are ours to hold lightly.
hero.body_md:
Nara reframes tropical astrology as what it actually is: a record of the year as lived from Earth, light returning and light leaving. No prediction, no determinism — an invitation to look at your own life, never a verdict about it.

Sibling of Kali · Paradevi (the objective deep sky); together they form Trika. Built in the open and bound to its GitHub repo — fork it, correct it, or reflect with it.
